sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling high blood pressure. The patient measures blood pressure at home. The patient has noticed they no longer see their blood pressures. The patient reports headaches when their blood pressure gets really high. The patient reports feeling dizzy when their blood pressure gets really high.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure was as high as 170 over 90. The patient is taking carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day. The patient is taking norvasc 10 milligrams daily.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has high blood pressure.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor wants the patient to keep a record of their blood pressures for their next visit. The clinician requested the patient to record their blood pressures.
